data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the AI agent note stating, 'Tends to book last minute, send reminder 24h early.' However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or retrieval of this specific AI agent note in the system. The linked use case mentions this note, but without concrete evidence of its presence, the requirement is not met, indicating a gap.
gaps: AI agent note 'Tends to book last minute, send reminder 24h early' is not found in the evidence.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of the AI agent note.
